title: ophrys × circlarium
intro: Ophrys × circlarium, also known as the bee orchid hybrid, is a rare and exotic orchid species resulting from the cross-pollination of Ophrys apifera and Ophrys sphegodes. While it has been used in traditional medicine, there is limited scientific evidence to support its medicinal properties and health benefits. Traditionally, it has been used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, although its effectiveness is largely anecdotal. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use is not widely recognized or recommended by modern herbalists.
